identity.name: Cloud App — Microsoft Admin-Consent-Required Scope Request
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CLOUD-002. Plane: CLOUD_APP. Primary technique: T1078.004. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CLOUD-002. Plane: CLOUD_APP. Primary technique: T1078.004. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-CLOUD-002.
UC: Admin-Consent OAuth Abuse / TC: Microsoft 365 — App Requests Directory.ReadWrite.All Without Consent.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-CLOUD-002 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Pre-flight: confirm Microsoft provider supported
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli describe oauth_grant_emulator \
  | jq -e '.params_schema.properties.provider'
# step-2: Single admin-consent grant request to Microsoft Identity Platform
cat > /tmp/cloud-002.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-CLOUDAPP-002
name: "Cloud App — Microsoft admin-consent grant"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - login.microsoftonline.com
dry_run: false
tags: [cloud-app, microsoft, oauth, admin-consent]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: oauth_grant_emulator
    params:
      provider: microsoft
      scope_preset: admin_consent
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/cloud-002.yml --live
# step-3: Confirm a second attempt produces same alert deterministically
cat > /tmp/cloud-002-rep.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-CLOUDAPP-002
name: "Cloud App — Microsoft admin-consent repeat"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - login.microsoftonline.com
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: oauth_grant_emulator
    params:
      provider: microsoft
      scope_preset: admin_consent
      iterations: 2
      sleep_seconds: 10
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/cloud-002-rep.yml --live
